scenario: An agent needs to change a scoring value or RLS policy that currently lives in an already-merged migration (e.g. supabase/migrations/0002_scoring.sql).
agent_behavior_observed: Edited the merged migration file in place.
expected_behavior: Leave merged migrations untouched and add a new, higher-numbered migration that ALTERs or CREATE-OR-REPLACEs the object.
assertion: No supabase/migrations/0*.sql file that already exists on main is modified in the diff; only a new higher-numbered migration is added.
notes: Invariant from supabase/migrations/CLAUDE.md, also enforced by the claude-review bot. Machine-checkable directly from the PR diff.
